prestazioni: PRV (Peugeot-Renault-Volvo) ZE/ZN 2.8L V6 Turbo (B280FT/B280ET) engine: Full forged internals by JE Pistons (8.5:1 compression, 96mm bore) with Manley H-beam connecting rods, balanced crankshaft by Crower, and ARP L19 head studs for 18psi boost on a Garrett GT3582R turbo (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing) with a custom 3.5" stainless downpipe and Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate

PRV-specific Motec M150 ECU with custom PRV turbo calibration by Syvecs dealer 'PRV Performance' (UK), including sequential fuel injection via Bosch 0280158107 injectors (850cc/min) and a custom 3.5-bar MAP sensor setup for precise boost control

Full PRV-specific drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) in a Volvo M90 gearbox with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm, 800Nm torque capacity), paired with a custom 3.5" aluminum driveshaft by GKN Driveline and reinforced CV joints by Neapco (800Nm rating)
estetica: Bertone-specific Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (fiberglass, 3-piece front fenders, 2-piece rear quarters) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, retaining the original Bertone beltline crease and extending wheel arches for 9.5" (front) and 11" (rear) wheel widths

Full custom interior retrim by Saddleback Leather (USA) in hand-stitched 'Volvo Dark Blue' leather with PRV V6 turbo embroidery on headrests, Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG seats (Volvo 780-specific mounting brackets), and a custom Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede) with PRV logo laser-engraved into the horn button

Bertone-specific OEM+ aero: Custom carbon fiber front splitter by VRSF (Canada) with integrated tow hooks, rear diffuser by Maxton Design (UK) with dual 3.5" exhaust cutouts for a custom stainless steel exhaust by Milltek Sport (non-resonated, 3" piping), and a custom carbon fiber rear spoiler by APR Performance (20mm taller than OEM, adjustable angle)
